title: Dual Daggers
description: Adds dual daggers as a new weapon
body:
![DualDaggers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7e43370a8c3d9064e65b2a19579643bb26a9ece.png)

Daggers are a fast dual-wield melee weapon. They are designed for close combat and focus on speed rather than heavy damage.

When holding one in each hand, attacks alternate automatically between both daggers. This allows for quick, continuous hits and a more aggressive fighting style compared to normal weapons.

Daggers are available for all major tool materials, from wood to netherite.
